title: Job Opening Teacher at Pearson India

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Teacher at Pearson India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Pearson India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Jabalpur-based team.

About Pearson India:
Pearson India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Content Creation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pearson India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
